retrieved_note: Pilot agent extraction from official public pages. Normalize before shipping to UI.

cards.card_name: Visa Classic Debit Card
notes: Current official card page says no minimum income requirement.
Public pages say no minimum balance requirement.

cards.card_name: Visa Gold Debit Card
notes: No income or balance threshold. Fee from official SOC.
Public pages say no minimum income requirement.
Minimum balance was not clearly stated.

cards.card_name: Visa Platinum Debit Card
notes: No income or balance threshold. Fee from official SOC.
Public card pages frame the product as not requiring a minimum income.
No clear minimum balance requirement was found in the surfaced public pages.

cards.card_name: Visa Signature Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Premier variant says zero annual and issuance fee; conventional signature pages show a fee.

notes: New customers: PKR 1,000,000 deposit.
Existing customers: 12-month average balance of PKR 1,000,000.
Premier and conventional variants should be modeled separately later.

cards.card_name: Visa Classic Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Basic: PKR 70,000 eligible spend in 2 months. Supplementary: PKR 35,000 eligible spend in 2 months.

notes: Salaried age cap appears to be 60; self-employed and supplementary appear to extend to 70.
Latest public Jan-Jun 2026 KFS shows PKR 7,000 basic annual fee and PKR 3,500 supplementary annual fee.
Latest public Jan-Jun 2026 KFS shows annual-fee reversal at PKR 70,000 eligible spend for the basic card and PKR 35,000 for the supplementary card within 2 months.

cards.card_name: Visa Gold Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Basic: PKR 200,000 eligible spend in 2 months. Supplementary: PKR 100,000 eligible spend in 2 months.

notes: Shared eligibility grid appears to apply across mainstream consumer credit cards.
Latest public Jan-Jun 2026 KFS shows PKR 13,000 basic annual fee and PKR 6,500 supplementary annual fee.
Latest public Jan-Jun 2026 KFS shows annual-fee reversal at PKR 200,000 eligible spend for the basic card and PKR 100,000 for the supplementary card within 2 months.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah American Express Gold Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First-year annual fee waived for Premier Banking customers only.

notes: Public summary box shows PKR 50,000 salaried and PKR 75,000 self-employed thresholds.
Salaried age cap appears to be 60; self-employed and supplementary appear to extend to 70.
Recovered as an unsecured credit-card product with income-based public eligibility rather than a deposit threshold.

Latest public Jan-Jun 2026 KFS shows annual-fee reversal at PKR 300,000 eligible spend for the basic card and PKR 150,000 for the supplementary card within 2 months.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Visa Platinum Credit Card

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Visa Ultra Cashback Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: First-year annual fee waiver on PKR 75,000 eligible spend within 2 months.

notes: PKR 50,000 minimum monthly salary for salaried applicants (PKR 75,000 for self-employed).
Recovered as the current official public naming for the Ultra Visa credit-card family.
Current official card page lists PKR 50,000 minimum gross income for salaried applicants.
Latest public Jan-Jun 2026 KFS lists PKR 10,000 basic annual fee and PKR 5,000 supplementary annual fee.
Latest public Jan-Jun 2026 KFS says Ultra cardholders are only eligible for a first-year annual-fee waiver on PKR 75,000 spend within 2 months.
Recovered as an unsecured credit-card product with income-based public eligibility rather than a deposit threshold.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Islamic Premier Visa Infinite Debit Card
notes: Mandatory PKR 1.5 million in current or savings account for Alfalah Islamic Premier status.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Premier Visa Infinite Debit Card
notes: Mandatory PKR 1.5 million in accounts for Alfalah Premier status.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Mastercard Titanium Credit Card
notes: PKR 50,000 minimum monthly salary for salaried applicants.

POSSIBLY DISCONTINUED: The Mastercard Titanium card does not appear in the Jan-Jun 2026 KFS Summary Box (which lists Classic, Gold, Optimus, Platinum, Premier Platinum, Ultra). The product page URL returns 404. The card may have been rebranded to Mastercard Optimus (PKR 16,000 annual fee). Verify before relying on this record.
Annual fee is null — not published in any current official document.

cards.card_name: Bank Alfalah Premier Visa Infinite Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: No annual or issuance fee while Premier Infinite criteria are maintained; customers not meeting the Premier Infinite AUM criteria are charged USD 500 equivalent in PKR.

notes: Premier Infinite is presented publicly as an invitation-only Premier product rather than a standard income-gated card.
Official Premier SOC states no annual and issuance fee for Premier Visa Infinite Credit Card, but customers not meeting the Premier Infinite AUM criteria are charged USD 500 equivalent in PKR.
The Islamic SOC mentions a PKR 150 Million AUM threshold for 'Islamic Infinite Banking' — this appears to be a distinct ultra-premium tier, not the conventional Premier Infinite tier.

The conventional Premier Infinite AUM threshold is not published clearly in accessible SOC documents. The conventional Premier Infinite Debit Card uses PKR 1.5M account balance; the credit card threshold is likely higher but unconfirmed. Needs manual verification against a current conventional SOC.

gaps: Several Premier / Infinite family cards still need cleaner separation between conventional, Premier, and Islamic Premier records.
Debit-card age requirements were generally not stated.
Some Islamic debit-card fee values were recovered from older surfaced SOC material rather than a current dedicated card page.
